currentFAQs.q: How much do solar panels cost in {{CITY}}?
currentFAQs.a: Most homeowners in {{CITY}} pay between {{AVG_LOW}} and {{AVG_HIGH}} before the 30% federal tax credit. After the credit, costs drop significantly.

currentFAQs.q: Is the 30% federal solar tax credit still available?
currentFAQs.a: Yes. The federal Investment Tax Credit (ITC) provides a 30% tax credit on the total cost of your solar installation through 2032. It drops to 26% in 2033 and 22% in 2034.

currentFAQs.q: How long does solar installation take?
currentFAQs.a: Physical installation typically takes 1-3 days. However, the full process from contract signing to power-on can take 2-3 months due to permitting and utility interconnection.
